HAPPY BIRTHDAY, COMMODORE ALBERTO A CRUZ PN (RET.)!
Isang taos-pusong pagbati ng maligayang kaarawan mula sa Lokal na Pamahalaan ng Montalban. Ipinagdarasal namin ang patuloy na biyaya, kalakasan, at karunungan mula sa Poong Maykapal upang patuloy kang maging gabay sa iyong pangunguna at tapat na paglilingkod sa bayan bilang Assistant Municipal Administrator for Logistics and Operations.
Muli, maligayang kaarawan pomula sa Bayan ng Montalban!
#BagongMontalban
#MGADO

"Kick-Off Tree Planting Activity | National Women’s Month 2026 
"
The Municipality of Rodriguez successfully conducted the *Kick-Off Tree Planting Activity today as part of the National Women’s Month 2026 celebration, promoting environmental stewardship and collective action for a more sustainable and gender-responsive community.
The activity recognized the continued support of Hon. Mayor Gen. Ronnie S. Evangelista (Ret.), Hon. Vice Mayor Edgardo "Umpek" Sison, and the Sangguniang Bayan, particularly Hon. Coun. Arnel De Vera, Chairperson of the Committee on Gender and Development, and Hon Coun. Anne Cuerpo, Vice Chairperson, for their continued support of Gender and Development initiatives in the municipality.
The activity was spearheaded by the Municipal Gender and Development Office (MGADO) under the leadership of Ms. Priscilla M. San Pascual, OIC–MGADO, together with the dedicated *MGADO Team*, serving as the lead office in organizing this meaningful initiative.
The office also extends its appreciation to partner departments and offices, including MENRO, Clean and Green, Municipal Security Division (MSD), Engineering Department, Municipal Transport and Management Development Office (MTMDO), General Services Office (GSO), Human Resource Management Office (HRMO), and other participating departments for their support and cooperation in making the activity possible.
Through this initiative, the Municipality of Rodriguez continues to promote environmental protection, gender equality, and community participation, reminding everyone that caring for the environment is also caring for the future of the community.
#NationalWomensMonth2026
#TreePlantingActivity
#GenderAndDevelopment
#RodriguezRizal 
#BagongMontalban

HAPPY BIRTHDAY, MR. MANOLITO S. DE JESUS (OIC-PROCUREMENT OFFICE)!
Isang taos-pusong pagbati ng maligayang kaarawan mula sa Lokal na Pamahalaan ng Montalban. Ipinagdarasal namin ang patuloy na biyaya, kalakasan, at karunungan mula sa Poong Maykapal upang patuloy kang maging gabay sa iyong pangunguna at tapat na paglilingkod sa bayan.
Muli, maligayang kaarawan mula sa Bayan ng Montalban!
#BagongMontalban 
#MGADO

NATIONAL WOMEN’S MONTH 2026 KICK-OFF | TREE PLANTING ACTIVITY
Bilang pakikiisa sa pagdiriwang ng National Women’s Month 2026, matagumpay na isinagawa ngayong Marso 10, 2026 ang Tree Planting na kick-off activity ng National Women’s Month 2026 na ginanap sa Community-Based Forest Management Area, Mt. Parawagan, Brgy. San Rafael. Pinangunahan ito ng Municipal Gender and Development Office (MGADO), katuwang ang Human Resource Management Office (HRMO), Municipal Environment and Natural Resources Office (MENRO) at Clean and Green Department. Ito'y bahagi ng pagsusulong ng pangangalaga sa kalikasan at pagpapalakas ng partisipasyon ng kababaihan sa mga gawaing nagtataguyod ng kaunlaran ng komunidad.
Isinagawa ang aktibidad sa buong suporta ng Pamahalaang Bayan ng Montalban, sa pamumuno ni Mayor General Ronnie S. Evangelista (Ret.).
#NationalWomensMonth2026
#BagongMontalban
#MGADO

Empathy. Resilience. Inclusion.
This is how film writer and director Arlie Sweet Sumagaysay‑Salvadico sees women lead — not just with strength, but with the stories of every woman she meets.
In film and media, women’s leadership matters. They broaden perspectives, challenge stereotypes, and open up space for experiences that are often overlooked.
As Direk Arlie says, gender equality advances when women lift each other up and use their voices to tell stories that celebrate dignity and our shared humanity. Let’s champion more women leaders in media, support their voices, and let the stories they tell light the path to equality for all.
#SheSays #WEcanbeEquALL #NWMC2026

Ayon sa Safe Spaces Act (RA 11313): Bawal ang bastos.
Kinikilala ng batas na ang lahat, anuman ang kasarian at pagkakakilanlan, ay may karapatan sa pagkakapantay-pantay, seguridad, at kaligtasan hindi lamang sa mga pribadong lugar kundi pati sa lansangan, public spaces, online platforms, lugar ng pinagtatrabahuhan, at paaralan.
Ipinagbabawal sa ilalim ng Safe Spaces Act ang iba’t ibang anyo ng gender-based sexual harassment tulad ng catcalling, mapanirang salita, malaswang biro o komento, stalking, malisyosong tingin at kilos, at iba pang hindi kanais-nais na kilos na lumalabag sa dignidad ng isang tao.
Kung ikaw ay nakaranas o nakasaksi ng ganitong mga gawain, maaaring mag-report sa #CHRYourGenderOmbud
